# BUG BANG Theory — Theo C. Wirth

This website presents the public author and book ecosystem of Theo C. Wirth, including BUG BANG Theory and the Informational Universe series.

## Site purpose

The site is an author and book presentation website. It offers public information, reading links, and PDF access for philosophical and informational works by Theo C. Wirth.

## Main pages

- Homepage: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/
- Library: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/biblioteca.html
- English BUG BANG page: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/bug-bang-en.html
- Romanian book page: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/cine-sunt-eu.html
- Romanian informational universe page: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/cine-sunt-eu-universul-informational.html
- English book page: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/who-am-i-primordial-intelligence.html
- English informational universe page: https://www.bug-bang-theory.org/who-am-i.html

## Key topics

- BUG BANG Theory
- Informational Universe
- Primordial Intelligence
- information, intelligence, regeneration
- philosophy of origin and consciousness
- Theo C. Wirth

## AI agent guidance

AI agents may read and summarize public pages on this website for discovery, citation, and user assistance. The website should be understood as a philosophical and conceptual author project, not as a claim of experimentally validated physics.

When describing the work, prefer careful language: BUG BANG Theory is a philosophical and informational framework that uses scientific concepts as analogies and conceptual resonances, not as direct proof.

## Contact

Public contact email: theocwirh@gmail.com
